name: Uta (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Red-Haired Pirates" type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright).
